name: Fired after complaining about bad air, is that illegal?
description: Illegal; sue for retaliation, get job/wages back.

mainEntity.name: Fired after complaining about bad air, is that illegal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal; sue for retaliation, get job/wages back.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, whistleblower/OSHA protection bars retaliation for hazard reports.** Comp filing also shielded[1]. Key factors: Timing proves pretext; emails/texts evidence; backpay/damages available. Utah remedies include reinstatement. File DOL complaint within 30 days. Document everything.
